title: 1981-04-16_Pat_15.txt
raw_text: knows that its first choice is inadequate + will be -will have to be- cancelled, in favor of the alternative in some way that I can't fathom, it derives an ultimate yield from these perpetual tentative provisional "errors" which in fact are not errors at all. Zoroastrian bitheism derives from this dialectical interaction, in which the first choice is thesis, the second antithesis, out of which comes a higher synthesis. Apparently this is how something truly new -i.e. a net gain of "energy" expressed as form, etc.- gets introduced into the system so that it does not run down. This is precisely where enentiodromia enters. That is the secret of how you keep the system totally negentropic: the "one" alternative by virtue of following the "zero" first choice amounts to something other than it would had it been chosen initially; I am led ineluctably to this conclusion, due to having experienced Valis' mind. "One" is the opposite of the "zero" choice but that is not the whole story. Some kind of conversion is involved in which "zero" serves a purpose. Is this simply a cybernetics flip-flop? I can't give a glib answer; this problem has puzzled mankind for a million years. I saw it at work - so I know it both folder 90 - 075 folder 90 - 075 F-3 exists + works, but I can't fathom it. To the extent that "zero" has a mind, has intelligence, it can't figure it out. What about the principle (or notion) that "anything pushed far enough turns into its opposite"? Is this what's involved? By the way: this is not what the "Tao Te Ching" teaches; it teaches that everything returns to its source - not quite the same as enantiodromia, but something like it. Both notions deal with some kind of conversion if a thing presses far enough. This is what I saw the wise horn of the dialectic accomplishing. Evil moves first, gets to a certain limit + then is flipped into its opposite by the wise horn (through what looked to me like pattern-completion; the wise horn builds onto what its opponent has done; the wise horn converts though, basically, one datum -integer- added to the sequence, which converts the total sequence. Hence I say: the system knows that its initial move is the wrong one. It's supposed to be the wrong one. But this move expresses/possesses power. It is able to lay out its steps. The wise horn has little work to do; evil does all the work. This has to be mechanical power exerting thrust, dynamic thrust. It draws its power from antecedent cause. Well, I can't see how it's done; I give up. Nonetheless it is done; the initial move (zero) is always the wrong one + it always gets converted into its binary opposite - effortlessly. Only wisdom, not force, is necessary to cause the conversion. This is absolutely vital. No energy at all is needed to cause the conversion. Yet it does not occur of its own accord. folder 90 - 076 F-4 Something is added to this "leg" or branch by the system -the mind of the total system- at the right place. This is not a law; this is the sentient exercise of intelligence! I saw + understood that in 3-74. Both Lao-Tzu + Heraclitus are wrong; Boehme is right. Zoroaster is right. He says "Mazda" - wise. That is the key: wisdom is the crucial factor, the absolute (a priori) knowledge involved. Hence I deem this a principle of selection, involving sentient choice. Conversion from zero to one is never automatic ("pushed far enough it turns into its opposite" or "reverts to its origins" - both views are incorrect. It is actively, deliberately converted due to the application of wisdom; there is a wise mind + it knows when, where + how to act to effect the conversion from zero to one. All I can do is stick to what I know (based on experiencing Valis' mind in 3-74): reinterpreted now -the dialectic, I mean- as a unitary entity/system operating in + by a binary zero-one switching. I saw zero (the wrong move) go first. I saw it converted by a slight, crucial addition into its opposite (the binary opposite, "one"). This "one" is the correct move. It is permanent; zero, because it inevitably gets converted, is provisional; it is subordinated, made use of: it is means; one is end. In my sleep revelation last week I saw the initial, zero leg fired as something for folder 90 - 077 folder 90 - 077 F-5 its binary opposite alternative "one" to work off it, like a substructure. Thus "one" is not firing into a vacuum. "Zero" was like a power discharge, power pure + simple. It provided an ergic base of some kind. It was quantitative; it had no qualities or attributes; it was simply a jet of energy - like the unshaped blob or thrown lump of clay. Content versus form? The artisan to make something -a given object, shape, form- must first have the raw material which he molds or shapes. I can't get this right. I saw it, saw that "zero" was a pure jet of force without "color" - i.e. quality. Oh my God; it was a discharge of the force of the pressure built up from the antecedent system, pure + simple; it was dissipated as pure formless energy, gotten rid of, which [relief of built-up pressure] then allowed the mind of the system to freely make its choice based on wise decision, not inexorable force. This is the secret of how the decisions can be based on wisdom (the right choice), not on necessity (the mindless karmic "choice" which is no choice at all! This is Noos "persuading" ananke: it persuades it by dissipating it harmlessly, which leaves Noos free to choose). There can be no choice unless + until the karmic pressure is discharged. This is how a "principle of selection of the Good can folder 90 - 078 folder 90 - 078 F-6 operate. The given exerts an inexorable pressure that has to be expiated before there can be a choice that is disjunctive. You otherwise cannot uncouple (from the antecedent weight), the zero firing permits the uncoupling so that indeed "it could have been other than it was." I see in this the "bills of particulars" that inexorably but mechanically accrue. I see in this harmless discharge -the zero or provisional wrong firing- the perfectly clear sheet that the Messenger inserts into the talion machine. The image of the raw material which the potter shapes makes sense. Two purposes, not one, are served by the zero (wrong) move. (1) Efficient-cause energy is drained off, leaving the mind of the system free to choose. (2) The discharge of power gives the mind something to shape, something to work on + from. This must be what the "Book of Creation" means by "the good refining the evil." Good cannot refine the evil unless the evil is there to be refined; good uses evil, but evil cannot use good (since good has the last word). The power of the past is real; it is the basic fact. It is the given, the universe of blind force. Wisdom does not actually strive against it, does not contest it; this is not a power struggle. Right does not make might. Might fires (zero), backed-up power is thus dissipated; the system shuts folder 90 - 079 folder 90 - 079 F-7 off, uncouples, ceases to be: might (the total force of the past, which is "astral determinism, fate, causation) has emptied itself into the boundless void harmlessly; the void so-to-speak accepts the blow, which is now not passed on, since the system is disjunctive (+ it is now possible to see what purpose is served by these disjunctions!). The Mind then chooses; the system pulse-phases back on, slightly different, now. What I am saying is that the system has to fire as it fired, wrong as it is (+ the Mind knows it is wrong). Something must become of this accumulated force. It thus expends itself... into the void (which is why the system must turn off momentarily). Now, it having come back on but slightly differently, that is, changed, we have a procession of discrete, unique frames comprising the reality-process. Here is where, precisely where, the human mind falls into its crucial self-destructive, occluding error. It reasons backward, from "effect" to "cause," which is not logical but, instead, is based on a perception of that that is. (Hume's "custom.") A fatal erroneous presumption is made, that I discerned back in the late Forties, viz: if Y follows X, Y must be caused by X. This argument -to the extent that it is argued at all- is totally circular. The tragedy, however, does not lie with/in what is wrongly perceived + "understood" but, rather, with what is obscured by this modem. Without folder 90 - 080 folder 90 - 080 F-8 the modem we would see the procession of discrete, differing frames that have no effect on each other, + this perception would either allow us or compel us to investigate the situation in order to understand it (i.e. precisely what I saw in 3-74 that I termed Valis or "pretextual cause"). Immediately we would comprehend reality as a single unitary field + not plural objects bumping into one another. After that, God knows what we'd conclude. It's taken me seven years of hard work to come up with this "binary forking" model, + I was able to do it only because Valis entered my mind in 3-74 + caused me to apprehend the dialectic as primary + irreducable, + then, recently, disclosed (1) the procession of discrete "time frames" + then (2) the initial zero firing. I never could have developed a model on my own! Based on what I saw. Well, I guess this is why we employ the modem of causality as an ontological Kantian ordering category. It seems logical (because in fact it is a conceptual tautology! It actually tells us nothing). (But this precisely is why we have philosophy: to analyze + demolish such circular lines of thought.) (+, precisely, this is why normal people have no use for philosophy; they see no problem; they construe philosophy as creating a problem, a false problem, not solving a real one. Hence Michael Bishop's rejection of the worth of my preoccupations.) So back in the late Forties I figured folder 90 - 081 F-9 out that causality is a projected modem based on a logical fallacy, but I had no idea what really was the case, inasmuch as change does take place in world. It has taken me over 30 years to figure it out - 7 years after I literally saw what is in fact the case, saw but did not understand. Well, anyhow, as Boehme saw, evil is a no (or zero) stage in God's evolution, + is self-limiting, always being subsumed by a later, higher, good synthesis, a yes (or one). This is what happens when you see a pewter dish struck by light; you suddenly know everything. I guess you are awakened for a bit. "They are like dreamers in private worlds," as Heraclitus said 2400 years ago. I raised an issue 32 years ago, got yelled at for my presumption -by Pat Wilson- + went on asking + questioning, + then in 1974 I got a look at the real state of things, + spent the next 7 years writing notes + studying books. Finally the selfsame thing that I saw in operation in 1974 explained it to me, + now I have my "two-slit" model, based on Whitehead, Hartshorne, Taoism + Shannon + Wienger etc. Oh yes: + Malebranche + Boehme. Is this what I wanted out of life, my life? Yes! The teenager in the Forties + the old man in the eighties say yes in unison.
